summary: VIP System Testing Complete - All features verified. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All VIP protection UI elements working correctly. Admin Card Sales dashboard functional.

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test users: +233599999999 (NO VIP) and +233588888888 (VIP GOLD)
